# Swirski UI

> Swirski UI is a React component package for bold, graphic, studio-flavored interfaces. It supports package imports from `@swirski/ui`, a source-copy workflow through `@swirski/cli`, and shadcn-compatible hosted registry items.

Swirski UI sits between shadcn/ui and Mantine: package primitives for speed, copyable source for ownership, and strong visual defaults built from thick borders, hard shadows, expressive typography, practical app components, and theme tokens.

Current package version: `@swirski/ui@1.2.5`.

Primary install paths:

- Package: `pnpm add @swirski/ui`
- Swirski CLI: `pnpm add -D @swirski/cli`
- shadcn registry: `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://ui.swirski.dev/r/button.json`

## Start Here

- [Home](https://ui.swirski.dev): Product overview and primary workflow choices.
- [Get Started](https://ui.swirski.dev/get-started): Package, Swirski CLI, and shadcn registry setup.
- [CLI and Registry](https://ui.swirski.dev/cli): Details for `@swirski/cli`, hosted registry URLs, and namespace setup.
- [System](https://ui.swirski.dev/system): Theme tokens, `SwirskiProvider`, component anatomy, and `asChild` conventions.
- [Build a Component](https://ui.swirski.dev/build-component): Guide for creating a new Swirski component with `pnpm create:component <name>`, plus the starter template, docs, registry metadata, and verification.
- [Component Template](https://ui.swirski.dev/templates/component/README.md): Copyable starter kit for source, export, test, docs, playground, and registry files.
- [Components](https://ui.swirski.dev/components): Component index with examples, imports, props, and playgrounds.
- [Hooks](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks): Hook index and recipes.
- [Examples](https://ui.swirski.dev/examples): Composed UI examples built from Swirski primitives.
- [Full LLM Context](https://ui.swirski.dev/llms-full.txt): Expanded reference with install workflows, component catalogue, hooks, registry notes, and code guidance.

## Registry

- [shadcn registry root](https://ui.swirski.dev/registry.json): Full hosted registry index.
- [swirski-base item](https://ui.swirski.dev/r/swirski-base.json): Shared system helpers, theme files, CSS variables, and base styles.
- [Button registry item](https://ui.swirski.dev/r/button.json): Minimal action primitive install example.
- [Dialog registry item](https://ui.swirski.dev/r/dialog.json): Modal overlay install example.
- [Select registry item](https://ui.swirski.dev/r/select.json): Custom dropdown picker install example.

## Component Docs

- [Accordion](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/accordion): Native disclosure stack.
- [Alert](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/alert): Composable callout block.
- [Avatar](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/avatar): Framed user image or fallback.
- [Badge](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/badge): Compact status label.
- [Breadcrumb](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/breadcrumb): Navigation trail primitives.
- [Button](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/button): Bold action primitive.
- [Card](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/card): Framed content block.
- [Checkbox](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/checkbox): Native checkbox with Swirski mark.
- [Container](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/container): Centered page width helper.
- [Cursor](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/cursor): Custom cursor provider and picker.
- [Dialog](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/dialog): Modal overlay primitive.
- [Drawer](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/drawer): Side sheet primitive.
- [DropdownMenu](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/dropdown-menu): Compact action menu.
- [Field](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/field): Field, label, input, and textarea primitives.
- [Grid](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/grid): Reusable CSS grid layout primitive.
- [ImageFrame](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/image-frame): Framed image surface.
- [Navbar](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/navbar): Header and mobile navigation primitives.
- [Popover](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/popover): Floating content panel.
- [Select](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/select): Custom dropdown picker.
- [SwirskiProvider](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/swirski-provider): Theme provider and token helpers.
- [Tabs](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/tabs): Tabbed section primitive.
- [Toast](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/toast): Status messages and toast provider.
- [Tooltip](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/tooltip): Hover and focus label.
- [Typography](https://ui.swirski.dev/components/typography): Title and Text primitives.

## Hook Docs

- [useClipboard](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-clipboard): Copy text and track copied/error state.
- [useClickOutside](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-click-outside): Run a callback when pointer events happen outside an element.
- [useControllableState](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-controllable-state): Build controlled or uncontrolled component state.
- [useDisclosure](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-disclosure): Open, close, and toggle boolean disclosure state.
- [useEscapeKey](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-escape-key): Run a callback when Escape is pressed.
- [useLocalStorage](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-local-storage): Persist React state in localStorage.
- [useMediaQuery](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-media-query): Track a CSS media query.
- [useReducedMotion](https://ui.swirski.dev/hooks/use-reduced-motion): Read `prefers-reduced-motion`.

## Optional

- [Repository README](https://github.com/rutgerswirski/swirski-ui): Project overview, development commands, release flow, and design principles.
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@swirski/ui): Published `@swirski/ui` package.
- [CLI package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@swirski/cli): Published `@swirski/cli` package.
